top_missing_source_outcomes.policy_title: Sign the Civil Rights Act of 1875
top_missing_source_outcomes.outcome_summary: Grant signed a federal public-accommodations and equal-treatment law, representing a major Reconstruction-era civil-rights protection, though later Supreme Court decisions limited its long-term enforcement.
top_missing_source_outcomes.curation_hint: Derived source-curation priority score 100: impact_direction=Positive, evidence_strength=Strong, status=Complete, measurable_impact=present, black_community_impact_note=present.

top_missing_source_outcomes.policy_title: Sign the Civil Rights Act of 1964
top_missing_source_outcomes.outcome_summary: Johnson delivered the central anti-discrimination law of the Civil Rights era through enactment of the Civil Rights Act of 1964.
top_missing_source_outcomes.curation_hint: Derived source-curation priority score 100: impact_direction=Positive, evidence_strength=Strong, status=Complete, measurable_impact=present, black_community_impact_note=present.

top_missing_source_outcomes.policy_title: Issue Executive Order 11246 on nondiscrimination and affirmative action in federal contracting
top_missing_source_outcomes.outcome_summary: Johnson created a stronger executive framework for nondiscrimination and affirmative-action enforcement in federal contracting before later Nixon-era expansion.
top_missing_source_outcomes.curation_hint: Derived source-curation priority score 100: impact_direction=Positive, evidence_strength=Strong, status=Complete, measurable_impact=present, black_community_impact_note=present.

top_missing_source_outcomes.policy_title: Enforce school desegregation at Little Rock
top_missing_source_outcomes.outcome_summary: Eisenhower used federal executive power to enforce court-ordered school desegregation against state resistance in Little Rock.
top_missing_source_outcomes.curation_hint: Derived source-curation priority score 100: impact_direction=Positive, evidence_strength=Strong, status=Complete, measurable_impact=present, black_community_impact_note=present.

top_missing_source_outcomes.policy_title: Sign the Civil Rights Act of 1957
top_missing_source_outcomes.outcome_summary: Eisenhower signed the first modern federal civil-rights law since Reconstruction, rebuilding federal civil-rights enforcement capacity even in a limited form.
top_missing_source_outcomes.curation_hint: Derived source-curation priority score 100: impact_direction=Positive, evidence_strength=Strong, status=Complete, measurable_impact=present, black_community_impact_note=present.

top_missing_source_outcomes.policy_title: Sign the Voting Rights Act Reauthorization of 2006
top_missing_source_outcomes.outcome_summary: Bush preserved major Voting Rights Act protections by signing the 2006 reauthorization, extending federal voting-rights enforcement before later judicial rollback.
top_missing_source_outcomes.curation_hint: Derived source-curation priority score 100: impact_direction=Positive, evidence_strength=Strong, status=Complete, measurable_impact=present, black_community_impact_note=present.

top_missing_source_outcomes.policy_title: Desegregate the armed forces
top_missing_source_outcomes.outcome_summary: Truman formally committed the federal government to ending segregation in the armed services and began a consequential process of military desegregation.
top_missing_source_outcomes.curation_hint: Derived source-curation priority score 100: impact_direction=Positive, evidence_strength=Strong, status=Complete, measurable_impact=present, black_community_impact_note=present.

top_missing_source_outcomes.policy_title: Issue Executive Order 10925 on equal employment opportunity
top_missing_source_outcomes.outcome_summary: Kennedy created an early modern equal-employment enforcement framework in federal contracting, requiring proactive action against discrimination.
